decisions.description: delay the API launch by two weeks

decisions.context: before scaling up due to cloud costs going over budget

action_items.what: coordinate with the DevOps team to set up the staging environment

sentiment.summary: The meeting tone was professional and collaborative, with participants discussing and agreeing on key decisions. The conversation was focused on the API launch timeline, documentation, and cost optimization. The participants demonstrated a constructive and solution-oriented approach to addressing challenges.

speaker_sentiments.speaker: John
speaker_sentiments.notes: Facilitated the discussion and ensured key decisions were made

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Sarah
speaker_sentiments.notes: Raised concerns and participated in the discussion

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Mike
speaker_sentiments.notes: Agreed with decisions and accepted action items
